ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* The current status of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* The type of study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the measure belongs to */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* The type of measure */,
  "measure_scale" TEXT /* The scale of the measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure the variable belongs to */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "variable_description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* The type of variable */,
  "variable_format" TEXT /* The format of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure the estimate belongs to */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the estimate belongs to */,
  "estimate_value" REAL /* The estimated value of the relationship */,
  "std_error" REAL /* The standard error of the estimate */,
  "t_value" REAL /* The t-value of the estimate */,
  "p_value" REAL /* The p-value of the estimate */,
  "estimate_method" TEXT /* The method used to estimate the relationship */,
  "estimate_confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval of the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* The institution the user belongs to */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study and measure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study and measure were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent used during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_file_variables" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id", "variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_collaborators" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "collaborator_id")
)
